prBody:
## Summary

- Adds `NotificationScheduler` — an `@Observable` singleton wrapping `UNUserNotificationCenter` for scheduling recurring workout reminders
- Introduces `NotificationSchedulerProtocol` for testability (mirrors the `HealthKitServiceProtocol` pattern) and `NotificationCenterProtocol` to allow mock injection in unit tests
- Wires `NotificationScheduler.shared` into `AppEnvironment` alongside the other service singletons
- Ships 25 unit tests in `NotificationSchedulerTests.swift` covering all four acceptance criteria

## Acceptance criteria

| Criterion | Status |
|---|---|
| `requestPermission()` returns auth status and updates a published property | ✅ Implemented |
| `scheduleReminders(days:time:)` creates one `UNNotificationRequest` per weekday with correct calendar trigger | ✅ Implemented |
| Calling `scheduleReminders` again removes previously scheduled fitness-reminder notifications before re-adding | ✅ Implemented |
| `cancelAll()` removes all pending fitness-reminder notifications | ✅ Implemented |

## Files changed

- `FitnessTracker/Services/NotificationScheduler.swift` — new service
- `FitnessTracker/App/AppEnvironment.swift` — wires in `notificationScheduler`
- `FitnessTrackerTests/NotificationSchedulerTests.swift` — new test file
- `FitnessTrackerTests/AppEnvironmentTests.swift` — verifies new service is accessible

Closes #27
